title: Multi-Task Screen View Model v1
description: Normalized view model emitted by harness/lib/multi_task_runner.screen_view_model. Single source of truth for TVS render path and fallback render path. Field renames or removals MUST be reflected in S02 architecture doc §4 and §9.

schema_version.description: Pins this contract. Bumping the value implies a breaking change to any consumer.

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC instant the view model snapshot was computed. Optional but recommended.

width_hint.description: Renderer hint for terminal columns (typical 80 or 120). Optional.

height_hint.description: Renderer hint for terminal rows (typical 20 or 24). Optional.

overall.description: Roll-up across capsules. error > warn > ok.

detail.description: Short human-readable explanation rendered next to the capsule.

panes.description: Always exactly 8 entries (main:0..3 then lab:0..3). Missing panes use state=missing as placeholder; the array is never shrunk.

plane.description: Which tmux session the pane belongs to.

role.description: PM|PLAN|BUILD|EVAL|LAB. Free-form short label, single token.

state.description: Fixed 10-word enum. Renames forbidden without S02 doc update.

model.description: Model label rendered in the pane row (e.g. Opus, Sonnet, GLM).

marker.description: Single printable ASCII character. Pattern restricts to U+0020..U+007E; emoji and non-ASCII glyphs are rejected. Common values: space (idle), '>' (working), '*' (attention).

active.description: Worker count currently in state=active. MUST be ≤ tracked.

tracked.description: Total workers known to the multi-task runner snapshot.

counts.description: Partition of tracked workers by sub-state. Sum SHOULD equal tracked; renderer is tolerant if sum < tracked (drift gets surfaced via meta.degraded).

time.description: HH:MM, 5 chars exactly. Date is intentionally omitted to keep the line short; absolute timestamps live in events.jsonl.

pane.description: Target pane in 'plane:slot' form, e.g. main:3, lab:0.

target_sprint_short.description: Slice short id, e.g. S04. Full sprint id is forbidden in this field; surfacing the full id would break 80x20 layout.

target_node.description: DAG node label, e.g. N8-eval, D3, N1. Free-form short token.

sprint_short.description: Currently focused slice. Full sprint id forbidden (see last_dispatch.target_sprint_short).

ready.description: Ready node short labels. Empty array means 'no ready node' and renders as 'ready=N/A' in fallback path.

source_intent.description: Which Control-Plane intent produced this view model. 'status' implies the verbose debug command was the entry point.

source.description: Data source identifier (e.g. lab, autopilot, tvs_render).

reason.description: Short code-like reason: lab_session_missing | capture_timeout:<pane> | tvs_render_error | ...

degraded.description: Empty array means all data sources are healthy.
